text:
FFS
 CERPAL_COMBINED_EVER Cerebral Palsy - Combined Medicare Medicaid Claims, First Ever Occurrence Date date - MM/DD/YYYY
 CERPAL_MEDICAID_EVER Cerebral Palsy - Medicaid Only Claims, First Ever Occurrence Date date - MM/DD/YYYY
 CERPAL_MEDICARE_EVER Cerebral Palsy - Medicare Only Claims, First Ever Occurrence Date date - MM/DD/YYYY
 CYSFIB_COMBINED Cystic Fibrosis and Other Metabolic Developmental Disorders - Combined Medicare Medicaid Claims 0 - Claims and FFS not met
1 - Claims met, not
